description: Landing-page hero + subhead + footer copy that includes the canonical safe-harbour line at the foot — must pass ADV-001 under the universal-channel gate (2026-04-27 founder directive).
text:
Own a piece of regen-ag

FarmThru opens its CSF round on Birchal on 23 June 2026. Place a $5 refundable deposit to lock in early access to the investment offer when the round opens.

100% refundable. No obligation to invest.

Always consider the general CSF risk warning and offer document before investing.
